query:
SELECT l.id, l.firstName, l.lastName, l.phone, l.country, l.assignedPartnerId, p.companyName as assignedTo, l.leadType
FROM leads l
LEFT JOIN partners p ON p.id = l.assignedPartnerId
WHERE l.phone LIKE '+352%' OR l.phone LIKE '00352%' OR l.country = 'LU' OR l.country = 'Luxembourg'
ORDER BY l.createdAt DESC;
